title: Reading and Use of English - Part 4
description: For questions 25 – 30, complete the second sentence so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence, using the word given. Do not change the word given. You must use between two and five words, including the word given. Here is an example (0).

example.firstSentence: It's possible that she left her keys at the office.
example.secondSentence: She (1) _________ her keys at the office.

questions.firstSentence: Someone has already answered all the questions.
It's a pity I didn't travel more when I was young.
questions.secondSentence: I (1) _________ more when I was young.

questions.firstSentence: No building in the city is taller than the tower.
questions.secondSentence: The tower is (1) _________ in the city.

questions.firstSentence: He allowed his daughter to stay out late.
Why don't we go to the new Italian restaurant?
questions.secondSentence: I (1) _________ to the new Italian restaurant.

questions.firstSentence: She wanted to know where the director lived.
